chills.name: Chills
chills.ask_text: Are you experiencing chills or shivering?

joint_pain.name: Joint Pain
joint_pain.ask_text: Do you have pain in your joints?

fatigue.name: Fatigue
fatigue.ask_text: Are you feeling very tired or fatigued?

rash.name: Rash
rash.ask_text: Do you have any rash or skin eruptions?

itching.name: Itching
itching.ask_text: Do you have itching on your body?

diarrhoea.name: Diarrhoea
diarrhoea.ask_text: Are you having loose or watery stools?

abdominal_pain.name: Abdominal Pain
abdominal_pain.ask_text: Do you have pain in your stomach or abdomen?

dehydration.name: Dehydration
dehydration.ask_text: Do you feel very thirsty or have a dry mouth?

weight_loss.name: Weight Loss
weight_loss.ask_text: Have you lost weight recently without trying?

persistent_cough.name: Persistent Cough
persistent_cough.ask_text: Have you had a cough lasting more than 2 weeks?

productive_cough.name: Productive Cough
productive_cough.ask_text: Are you coughing up phlegm or mucus?

rapid_breathing.name: Rapid Breathing
rapid_breathing.ask_text: Is the patient breathing faster than normal?

chest_pain.name: Chest Pain
chest_pain.ask_text: Do you have any pain in your chest?

night_sweats.name: Night Sweats
night_sweats.ask_text: Do you wake up drenched in sweat at night?

blood_in_sputum.name: Blood in Sputum
blood_in_sputum.ask_text: Have you noticed blood when you cough?

pallor.name: Pallor
pallor.ask_text: Does the patient look pale, especially in the nails and eyes?

dizziness.name: Dizziness
dizziness.ask_text: Do you feel dizzy or lightheaded?

brittle_nails.name: Brittle Nails
brittle_nails.ask_text: Are your nails brittle or spoon-shaped?

high_bp.name: High Blood Pressure
high_bp.ask_text: Is the blood pressure reading high?

frequent_urination.name: Frequent Urination
frequent_urination.ask_text: Are you urinating more often than usual?

slow_healing.name: Slow Healing
slow_healing.ask_text: Do your wounds take a long time to heal?

numbness.name: Numbness
numbness.ask_text: Do you feel numbness or tingling in hands or feet?

jaundice.name: Jaundice
jaundice.ask_text: Are your eyes or skin looking yellow?

dark_urine.name: Dark Urine
dark_urine.ask_text: Is your urine darker than usual?

constipation.name: Constipation
constipation.ask_text: Are you having trouble passing stools?

swelling.name: Swelling
swelling.ask_text: Do you have swelling in your hands, feet, or face?

sore_throat.name: Sore Throat
sore_throat.ask_text: Do you have a sore throat?

runny_nose.name: Runny Nose
runny_nose.ask_text: Do you have a runny or blocked nose?

itching_anus.name: Anal Itching
itching_anus.ask_text: Do you have itching around the anus, especially at night?

visible_worms.name: Visible Worms
visible_worms.ask_text: Have you seen worms in your stool?

hair_changes.name: Hair Changes
hair_changes.ask_text: Has your hair become thin, dry, or discolored?

skin_changes.name: Skin Changes
skin_changes.ask_text: Do you have dry, flaky, or discolored skin?
